summary: Two parallel test plans delivered. Tester: 34 TCs + 3 gate commands covering OUT-1..7, including token hex diff, keyframe timing grep, layout assertions, simulated peer/file lifecycle, and a deferred real-hardware E2E (OUT-7) substituted by a simulated-peer Vitest integration test and a handoff shell script. Designer: 15 visual VCs with copy-paste screencapture + AppleScript commands, plus 6 deferred timing-only checks. Both plans explicitly flag the no-SSH-access gap on OUT-7.
